title: euonymus cornutus
intro: Euonymus cornutus, also known as the horned spindle tree or horned euonymus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euonymus cornutus are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Euonymus cornutus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine in various forms, including capsules and dried roots.
